title: Amtech S4600 4-Way Plumbing Key, Multi-Functional Utility Key, Radiator Key, Tap Key, Unlocks Electric, Gas and Water Meter Boxes (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
Multi-access plumbing key suitable for use on gas, electric, and water meter cabinets, as well as stop cocks, outside taps and radiators.
Features a large and small square key shape, as well as a triangular and flat offset key.
This utility key is easy to carry and store in confined spaces as it is only 60g in weight and relatively small.
Similar item available: Amtech S4602 Universal Utility Key
